title: Unit 1C: My house - Lesson 3: Which toothbrush do you prefer?
desc:
- toothbrush, toothpaste, towel, comb, take a bath, take a shower
- Which toothbrush do you prefer?
+ I prefer the toothbrush which is yellow.
- Do you prefer taking a bath or taking a shower?

title: Unit 2C: My busy day - Lesson 1: When does Julia go shopping?
desc:
- go shopping, go roller skating, go for a walk, go for a drive, go for a swim
- When does Julia go shopping? 
She goes shopping on Fridays.
